creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

I'm using monitoring-plugins with icinga2, and I noticed some sporadic segmentation failures in check_http when checking websites using SSL/TLS.

These are quite annoying since, from time to time, they cause false alarms.

I've tracked down to an upstream bug, so I filed a pull request upstream with the fix I'm using locally:

https://github.com/monitoring-plugins/monitoring-plugins/pull/1552

I'm posting this bug for informative purposes, to let the maintainer know about this patch.

Thanks!
